ja.title: 眼鏡が飽和すると選択圧は無力 — 反証4コマ #29
ja.header:
Goodhart の法則と
proxy fitness の限界

panels.caption: #26 で monoculture が 0.05 に改善
反証1: 飽和した眼鏡には淘汰が効かない
panels.bubble:
審査員増やす前に
答案を直せ!

panels.caption: 反証2: 0.05 が測ったのは「行動だけ」
panels.bubble:
系統も改善した?
…それ私の早合点

全8系統そろってる!
…半分は ICU で延命中
panels.caption_box:
proxy が測る範囲を正直に限定
指標が目標になると壊れる
綺麗な数字はサイレン
panels.foot: → 本編で Goodhart の解剖を全部見る

en.title: A saturated lens makes selection powerless — Falsification #29
en.header:
Goodhart's law and
the limits of proxy fitness

panels.caption: Reflection 1: a saturated lens defeats any selector
panels.bubble:
Fix the test paper,
not the judges!

panels.caption: Reflection 2: 0.05 measured behavior only
panels.bubble:
Lineage improved too?
…that was my own jump

All 8 lineages present!
…half on life support
panels.caption_box:
State honestly what proxy can measure
A metric-as-target stops being good
A clean number is a siren
panels.foot: → Full Goodhart dissection in the article

zh.title: 眼镜饱和则选择压无力 — 反证四格 #29
zh.header:
Goodhart 定律与
proxy fitness 的极限

panels.caption: 反证1: 饱和的眼镜让任何淘汰器失效
panels.bubble:
先修考卷，
别加评委!

panels.caption: 反证2: 0.05 只测了「行为」
panels.bubble:
系统也改善了?
…那是我自己误判

8 个系统都在!
…一半靠维生设备吊命
panels.caption_box:
诚实界定 proxy 能测什么
指标变目标就不再是好指标
漂亮的数字是警报
panels.foot: → 正文里看 Goodhart 的完整解剖

ko.title: 안경이 포화되면 선택압은 무력 — 반증 4컷 #29
ko.header:
Goodhart 법칙과
proxy fitness 의 한계

panels.caption: 반증1: 포화된 안경엔 어떤 선택기도 무력

panels.caption_box:
proxy 가 재는 범위를 정직히 한정
지표가 목표가 되면 망가진다
깔끔한 숫자는 사이렌
